raw_consumer_statement:
I purchased a gym membership with XXXX  XXXX XXXX ( XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, CA XXXX ) on XX/XX/XXXXXXXX  for {$1100.00} ( Pro-rated {$100.00} per month ). The membership was to expire on XX/XX/XXXX. I was fraudulently sold services for a full year 's membership, when XXXX  XXXX XXXX was going through Bankruptcy proceedings. On XX/XX/XXXX, I was told the XXXX XXXX is closing. I asked for a refund and the sales manager told me to dispute the charge with my credit card company because they can not refund me. XXXX  XXXX XXXX did not fulfill the terms of the contract. 

I asked my credit card company to refund the pro-rated amount of $ XXXX submitted a copy of my contract and a letter from the XXXX XXXX XXXX their closure. I highlighed the portion of my contract that states : REVOCATIONS AND REFUNDS. Member agrees that XXXX may revoke this Membership, in XXXX  sole discretion, by giving written notice to Member. Any unused Membership Dues in possession of XXXX at the time of the effective date of revocation or cancellation will be paid to Member within 4 weeks of effective date of revocation. 

I've disputed the charge with my credit card company twice and until this day, they deny that request.
